LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT 992 PERALTA STREET L.L.C.'S MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF ARLENE CAMPBELL A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, REQUIRE THAT MS. CAMPBELL POST SECURITY IN THIS CASE AND FOR A PREFILING ORDER IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON 992 PERALTA'S DEMURRER. WHILE THE REQUEST FOR A PREFILING ORDER TECHNICALLY IS NOT MADE MOOT BY THE SUSTAINING OF THE DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION NOT TO ADDRESS THAT REQUEST AT THIS TIME. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set June 12, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to March 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2017 Continued To Oct-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to October 31, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID T. HAYEK OF P.K. SCHRIEFFER LLP, TEL. NO. 1-626-373-2444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant 992 Peralta Street L.L.C.'s demurrer to all causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Arlene Campbell is sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID T. HAYEK OF P.K. SCHRIEFFER LLP, TEL. NO. 1-626-373-2444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant 992 Peralta Street L.L.C.'s motion to strike certain portions of the complaint filed by plaintiff Arlene Campbell is off calendar in light of the ruling on 992 Peralta's demurrer. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Plaintiff Arlene Campbell A Vexatious Litigant, Requiring Plaintiff To Furnish Security And For Prefiling Order
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID T. HAYEK OF P.K. SCHRIEFFER LLP, TEL. NO. 1-626-373-2444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant 992 Peralta Street L.L.C.'s motion to declare plaintiff Arlene Campbell a vexatious litigant, require that Ms. Campbell post security in this case and for a prefiling order is off calendar in light of the ruling on 992 Peralta's demurrer. While the request for a prefiling order technically is not made moot by the sustaining of the demurrer without leave to amend, the court exercises its discretion not to address that request at this time. Moving party to prepae form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
